name: pickright-platform
description: 儿童彩妆选购助手平台 - 帮家长擦亮眼睛

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:setup
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
scripts.lint:fix: cd backend && npm run lint:fix && cd ../frontend && npm run lint:fix
scripts.docker:setup: docker compose build && docker compose up -d && sleep 3 && docker compose run --rm seed
